steps.description: Focused backend health-route gate over the six public route-facing assertions.
steps.command: python3 -m pytest tests/test_bayes_market_api.py -k 'test_root_route_returns_service_index or test_legacy_health_routes_return_legacy_health_payload or test_v1_health_route_returns_versioned_health_payload or test_v1_health_route_is_method_not_allowed_for_non_get or test_legacy_health_http_routes_return_service_payload or test_v1_health_http_returns_versioned_service_payload' -v --tb=short

steps.description: Broader backend API module run executed only after the focused gate passed.

notes: The focused selector passed first, so the broader module run remained fail-fast and in-sequence.
backend/server.py now uses shared health-route constants so the service index, router, and GET dispatch stay aligned when the health surface changes.
